Enumerations of resource and timeline resource IDs, and a static constant for system resource version.


## Files
- **[resource_ids.auto.h](resource_ids.auto.h.md)**: Defines an enumeration of resource IDs for various icons and fonts used in the firmware.
- **[resource_version.auto.h](resource_version.auto.h.md)**: Defines a static constant for the system resource version with a CRC and timestamp.
- **[timeline_resource_ids.auto.h](timeline_resource_ids.auto.h.md)**: Defines an enumeration of timeline resource IDs for various notifications and events.
